_comment: Requires Entra ID P2 licensing. Deployed in report-only mode (enabledForReportingButNotEnforced) per Microsoft's guidance: confirm impact in the sign-in logs before switching state to 'enabled'. Do not combine sign-in risk and user risk conditions in the same policy; keep this separate from the user risk policy below. Legacy standalone Identity Protection risk policies retire October 1, 2026, so this is built directly as a Conditional Access risk-based policy rather than the deprecated legacy configuration.
